hero.subtitle: We protect forests, empower communities, and restore ecosystems across India.
hero.subtitleHighlight: Together, we plant the seeds of tomorrow.

mission.heading: Four Pillars of
mission.explorePrompt: Hover over any surrounding node in the network to inspect our core areas of impact.
mission.mobilePrompt: Tap a pillar icon to expand and explore our ecological work.
mission.pillar1Desc: Breathing life back into degraded lands. We plant biodiverse micro-forests of native species that rebuild topsoil, capture carbon, and trigger the return of lost wildlife.
mission.pillar2Desc: Revitalizing critical biomes from the Himalayas to the Western Ghats. We restore endangered wetlands and ancient grasslands to buffer communities against climate extremes.
mission.pillar3Desc: Putting stewardship back into indigenous hands. We co-create green micro-economies and agroforestry models, turning nature conservation into an engine of local prosperity.
mission.pillar4Desc: Igniting a nationwide green consciousness. Through interactive schooling, technology tools, and policy updates, we empower tomorrow's leaders to defend our shared heritage.

programs.heading: Initiatives That
programs.subtitle: From dense forests to urban schools, our programs create lasting impact across diverse landscapes and communities.
programs.program1Desc: Our flagship annual plantation campaign spanning all 28 states. Communities come together every monsoon to plant millions of native trees.
programs.program2Desc: Protecting India's endangered species through habitat restoration, anti-poaching patrols, and corridor creation between fragmented forests.
programs.program3Desc: Transforming 10,000 schools into environmental learning hubs with gardens, waste management systems, and nature curricula.

impact.heading: Numbers That
impact.subtitle: Real results from the ground — measured, verified, and growing every day.
impact.hectaresDesc: Degraded land brought back to life

stories.heading: Stories from the
stories.subtitle: Real stories from the people whose lives have been transformed by our collective green mission. Click any card to explore the full story.
stories.person1Desc: Left his desk job to lead corporate reforestation drives in Mumbai's outskirts, mobilizing over 200 volunteers to plant native saplings.
stories.person1Quote: I volunteered on a whim and it changed my life. The energy on the ground, planting saplings with strangers who become family — there's nothing like it.
stories.person2Desc: Spearheaded the transformation of a 25-hectare dry wasteland in Rajasthan into a thriving micro-forest, restoring local water tables.
stories.person2Quote: Green Bharat transformed our village. What was once barren wasteland is now a thriving forest. Our children have clean air and our women have livelihoods from the forest produce.
stories.person3Desc: Advises scientific mapping and monitoring of corridors to ensure reforested areas connect animal habitats safely.
stories.person3Quote: As a wildlife biologist, I've seen the corridors created by Green Bharat bring back species we hadn't seen in decades. Their scientific approach to conservation is remarkable.
stories.person4Desc: Established local environmental clubs and waste management programs in over 15 public schools across Uttarakhand.
stories.person4Quote: The Green Schools program changed how my students see the environment. They're now the ones teaching their parents about composting and water conservation.
stories.person5Desc: Pioneered soil rejuvenation, organic multi-crop farming, and tree husbandry methods in rural Karnataka.
stories.person5Quote: Green Bharat's agroforestry model has doubled our family income while restoring our ancestral land. It proves that economy and ecology can walk hand in hand.

contact.subtitle: Whether you want to volunteer, partner, or simply learn more — we'd love to hear from you.
